data.description:
RED task: write tests/scripts/test-resolve-dso-version.sh covering all resolution paths.

Test cases (must fail RED before Task e423-7c77 is implemented, pass GREEN after):
1. Tier-1 hit: installed_plugins.json contains dso entry with ref — emits version from Tier 1, tier=1.
2. Tier-1 miss / Tier-2 hit: no installed_plugins.json (or no dso entry) + ci.dso_plugin_version set in config — emits version from Tier 2, tier=2.
3. Tier-2 miss / Tier-3 hit: no Tier 1/2 — reads stable dso channel from marketplace.json, emits ref + tier=3.
4. Tier-3 rejects dso-dev: marketplace.json has only dso-dev channel — exits non-zero with explicit error, does NOT use dso-dev ref.
5. All tiers fail: exits non-zero; stderr names each failed tier.
6. Security rejection: resolved URL is non-navapbc — exits non-zero with diagnostic.
7. Malformed Tier-3 channel: dso entry has no ref — exits non-zero with explicit error.

Implementation: use mktemp for all temp fixtures. Mock installed_plugins.json and marketplace.json via env vars (PLUGIN_TRACKING_FILE, MARKETPLACE_JSON). Use WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE for dso-config.conf override (matches read-config.sh convention).

Done criteria:
- tests/scripts/test-resolve-dso-version.sh exists and is executable.
- All 7 test cases defined and pass after implementation lands (GREEN).
- .test-index updated: plugins/dso/scripts/resolve-dso-version.sh -> tests/scripts/test-resolve-dso-version.sh
data.title: test: write behavioral unit tests for resolve-dso-version.sh (RED-first)
